dialogue_text: Why did they live at the bottom of a well?
source_excerpt: Alice did not quite know what to say to this: so she helped herself to some tea and bread-and-butter, and then turned to the Dormouse, and repeated her question. "Why did they live at the bottom of a well?"

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.
